content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 17, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 17, 2026, focused on stabilizing the cloud infrastructure, resolving critical billing and provisioning leaks for Product 2, and enhancing the mobile onboarding experience. Significant progress was made in hardening the production environment and ensuring reliable agent deployment.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

### Cloud Infrastructure & Provisioning
- Implemented a dedicated apps-control provisioning daemon with job lanes to resolve architecture gaps in per-app isolated database hosting ([#8514](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8514)).
- Fixed critical billing and provisioning leaks, including ensuring suspended containers are stopped, isolated databases are properly deprovisioned, and credit debits are atomic ([#8465](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8465), [#8484](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8484), [#8485](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8485)).
- Improved registry probe resilience for digest-pinned image references ([#8467](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8467)).

### Mobile & UI Enhancements
- Introduced an iOS-style three-detent chat sheet with floating suggestions ([#8487](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8487)).
- Enabled first-time passkey setup for new cloud accounts to improve onboarding parity ([#8512](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8512)).
- Updated Android onboarding to show a 3-way runtime chooser instead of auto-seeding local agents ([#8469](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8469)).

### CI/CD & Dependency Management
- Migrated trusted Linux CI jobs to self-hosted Hetzner runners to improve reliability and performance ([#8501](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8501), [#8503](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8503)).
- Performed extensive dependency updates across the workspace, including `ai`, `tailwindcss`, and `undici` ([#8506](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8506), [#8479](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8479), [#8480](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8480)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
- [#8500](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8500): Routing compute jobs to self-hosted runners.
- [#8489](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8489): Restoring stable production UI and API key permissions to staging.
- [#8483](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8483): Dependency update for `ignore`.

## CLOSED ISSUES
- **Mobile Pipeline & APK Integrity:** Resolved issues where clean-tree builds produced web-less APKs, ensuring plugin manifests and web payloads are correctly bundled ([#8387](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8387)).
- **Product 2 Billing & Correctness:** Completed the audit and fix of billing leaks for isolated app hosting, ensuring profitability and correctness for the go-live phase ([#8342](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8342)).

## NEW ISSUES
- No new issues were opened on this date.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
- **[#8434](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8434) Cloud 10-user launch tracker:** Extensive discussion regarding the production cutover. Key updates include the successful verification of the provisioning chain on production, the resolution of inference pricing issues, and the ongoing migration of Headscale to the control-plane node to ensure proper agent isolation and tailnet registration. The team is coordinating the final production cutover steps, including DNS migration and the activation of the apps data plane.
